extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates proceedings by direction and category: I counted only the Against Company rows (1 criminal, 35 tax, nil regulatory), Against Directors rows (1 criminal, 14 tax, nil regulatory), and Against Promoters rows (9 criminal, 74 tax, 2 statutory/regulatory); I excluded all By Company, By Directors and By Promoters rows, and excluded promoter/director matters from the aggregate amount. Tax proceedings against the company total 35, with no subsidiary row disclosed; the company-only quantified aggregate amount is the explicit ₹1,161.98 million figure in the Against Company row, converted to ₹116.198 crore, while the promoter amount is excluded. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹608 million as of December 31, 2024, converted to ₹60.8 crore, rather than a re-sum. The concentration disclosures provided are segment/product, geographic, supplier or retail-partner figures, not company-wide top-five/top-ten customer revenue percentages for a full fiscal year; the source monetary tables use ₹ million, converted to crore by dividing by 10.
